message.content:
@startuml
actor User
boundary UI
control Application
database Database

User -> UI : go to Tables page
UI -> Application : Dump Tables
Application -> Database : Dump Tables
Database --> Application : Tables
Application --> UI : Tables
User -> UI : Click "Delete" on a Class
UI -> Application : DeleteClass(ClassID)
Application -> Database : DeleteClass(ClassID)
Database --> Application : Success
Application --> UI : Success
UI -> UI : Update table
@enduml
